title: paeonia mairei f. oxypetala
intro: Paeonia mairei f. oxypetala, also known as the white peony or shao yao, is a species of flowering plant in the peony family (Paeoniaceae). It is used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and analgesic effects due to the presence of phenolic compounds and glycosides. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing menstrual cramps, regulating menstrual cycles, and alleviating symptoms of menopause, as well as having antioxidant and anti-cancer properties. In herbal preparations, the roots of Paeonia mairei f. oxypetala are typically dried and processed into teas, capsules, or tinctures for medicinal use.
